scope: Pre-Phase 4 premium BookQuest art direction and usability verification

signatureElements: editorial serif headings with utilitarian sans-serif controls

surfaces: signed-in desktop and mobile workspace shell

browserVerification.fontLoading: Instrument Serif and Manrope confirmed from computed styles

qualityFix: The signed-in home load callback is now stable and no longer refetches account and course data whenever the user object is updated.
scopeLimit: This is a pre-Phase 4 product-quality release. It does not start Phase 4, close the Blacksteel pilot, or replace the independent Phase 3 WCAG 2.2 AA assessment.
